questions.question: In The Drew Carey Show, Drew and his friends ran a small business out of his garage selling what caffeinated alcoholic beverage?
With the initials K.K., what famous houseguest was a witness in the OJ Simpson trial?
What song by the artist Seal won the Grammy for Song of the Year in 1996?
What African-American actress became the first to win a Best Actress Oscar for her work in 2001's Monster's Ball?
What minty candies were known as 'The Fresh Maker'? Putting them in Coca-Cola, they became the mess maker.
